titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Salamah Ibn Tammam, the Companion of Amir Al-muʾminin, Peace Be Upon Him
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Salamah Ibn Tammam, the Companion of Amir Al-muʾminin, Peace Be Upon Him

segments: ه عن سلمة بن تمام صاحب أمير المؤمنين عليه السّلام‌.
arabic.text: ه عن سلمة بن تمام صاحب أمير المؤمنين عليه السّلام‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Salamah ibn Tammam, the companion of Amir Al-Muʾminin, peace be upon him, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Al-Husayn ibn Saʿid, from Hammad ibn ʿIsa, from Hariz, from Salamah ibn Tammam, the companion of Amir Al-Muʾminin, peace be upon him.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Salamah ibn Tammam, the companion of Amir Al-Muʾminin, peace be upon him, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Al-Husayn ibn Saʿid, from Hammad ibn ʿIsa, from Hariz, from Salamah ibn Tammam, the companion of Amir Al-Muʾminin, peace be upon him.
